title: Parathyroid clinic documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports thirst, polyuria, constipation, osteoporosis, fragility-fracture and renal-stone context; repeat albumin-adjusted calcium, concurrent PTH and specialist-advice documentation when clinician-selected.
assessment.rationale: Supports calcium, PTH, osteoporosis, fracture and renal-stone context for parathyroid clinic documentation; no decision is generated.

source.title: Hyperparathyroidism (primary): diagnosis, assessment and initial management
source.population: People with features or laboratory findings that may indicate primary hyperparathyroidism and people with confirmed disease.
source.setting: Primary and secondary care diagnostic testing, assessment, referral, management and monitoring.
source.exclusions: Partial for a generic calcium-result review because the source is disease-specific. Exact only for selected symptom, albumin-adjusted calcium, PTH, renal, vitamin D, DXA and clinician-led follow-up documentation.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.1.1–1.1.10 — albumin-adjusted calcium and PTH testing

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports thirst, polyuria, constipation, osteoporosis, fragility-fracture and renal-stone context; repeat albumin-adjusted calcium, concurrent PTH and specialist-advice documentation when clinician-selected.

assessment.text: Supports clinician-reviewed vitamin D, urine calcium, renal function, DXA and renal-tract imaging in a confirmed or probable primary-hyperparathyroidism context.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-reviewed vitamin D, urine calcium, renal function, DXA and renal imaging for parathyroid clinic documentation; no decision is generated.
